meanings.definition: the crisp residue left after lard has been rendered
the residue that remains after animal fat has been rendered
the sharp sound of snapping noises

examples: My Rice Krispies crackled in the bowl
his shoes were crunching on the gravel

meanings.definition: to become, or to cause to become, covered with a network of small cracks
examples: The blazing sun crackled the desert sand
